# LICENSE NOTE — `components/` (Tailwind UI)

## Provenance

All HTML files in this directory are **clean-room reconstructions** produced in-session by Claude (Opus 4.7) from the publicly documented Tailwind Labs house style. They are:

- Inter font stack
- `gray-50..950` + `indigo-600` accent scale (stock Tailwind CSS, MIT)
- `rounded-md` / `shadow-xs` / `focus-visible:outline-2 focus-visible:outline-offset-2`
- `@tailwindcss/forms` style input primitives

No file was extracted from the paid Tailwind UI package (tailwindui.com). No login was used. The files are derivative of:
- Tailwind CSS (MIT) — Tailwind Labs, Inc.
- Headless UI (MIT) — Tailwind Labs, Inc.
- Publicly documented patterns on tailwindcss.com docs.

## Usage

Non-commercial internal reference only inside the `consolidate/claude-design-feed` workspace. Not for redistribution. If you ship a production app modelled after this aesthetic, purchase a Tailwind UI licence at https://tailwindui.com/license.

## Contents

~465 HTML variants covering: buttons, badges, inputs, selects, checkboxes, radios, toggles, alerts, avatars, cards, modals, dropdowns, tabs, pagination, breadcrumbs, tables, list views, headings, feeds, navbars, footers, stacked-layouts, sidebar-layouts, forms, heroes, features, CTAs, pricing tables, testimonials, FAQs, stats, ecommerce product pages, ecommerce category grids, steppers, tooltips, spinners, progress bars, command palettes, toasts, dividers, skeletons, empty states, description lists, grids, 404 pages, sign-in forms, bento grids, logo clouds, newsletter signups, team sections, blog grids.

## Attribution

Clean-room reimplementation. Aesthetic reference to Tailwind Labs' public design language.
